query: SELECT id, name, title, company, project, roleRelevance, contactTrustTier FROM contacts WHERE roleRelevance = 'high' AND (title LIKE '%medicare%' OR title LIKE '%insurance%' OR title LIKE '%hotel%' OR title LIKE '%school%' OR title LIKE '%retail%' OR title LIKE '%pharmaceutical%' OR title LIKE '%university%' OR title LIKE '%real estate%' OR title LIKE '%banking%' OR title LIKE '%hospitality%' OR title LIKE '%enrollment%' OR title LIKE '%enrolment%') LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, name, title, company, project, roleRelevance, contactTrustTier FROM contacts WHERE roleRelevance = 'high' AND (title LIKE '%medicare%' OR title LIKE '%insurance%' OR title LIKE '%hotel%' OR title LIKE '%school%' OR title LIKE '%retail%' OR title LIKE '%pharmaceutical%' OR title LIKE '%university%' OR title LIKE '%real estate%' OR title LIKE '%banking%' OR title LIKE '%hospitality%' OR title LIKE '%enrollment%' OR title LIKE '%enrolment%') LIMIT 20
